channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Report: White House Considers 250 Pardons for U.S. Anniversary
item.description: White House aides are discussing a plan for President Trump to issue 250 pardons tied to the nation's 250th anniversary celebration.

item.title: Federal Agents Raid Home of Anti-ICE Activist Linked to Violence at California Marijuana Farm
Jerome Powell's Tenure Ends as New Fed Chair Takes Office
Trump Receives Red-Carpet Welcome in China, but Past Visit Shows Limits of Pageantry
item.description: Trump arrives in Beijing with a red carpet ceremony ahead of talks with Xi Jinping focused on trade tensions and the war with Iran.
